pi_items.source: task.json description field and setup_task.sh/export_result.sh scripts confirm identical path
task.json description field and setup_task.sh/export_result.sh scripts confirm identical path
task.json description explicitly states 'Resolution: 512 x 512 px', verifier.py line 46 checks img_data.get('width') == 512
task.json description explicitly states 'Resolution: 512 x 512 px', verifier.py line 46 checks img_data.get('height') == 512

task.json description states 'Rotation X: 54.7 degrees'. Mathematical verification: this is arctan(sqrt(2)) ≈ 54.7356 degrees, the standard isometric projection angle. Verifier.py line 83 checks abs(rot[0] - 54.7) < 3.0
task.json description explicitly states 'Rotation Z: 45 degrees'. Verifier.py line 84 checks z_is_corner allowing angles 45, 135, 225, 315 degrees

verifier.py lines 83, 84, and 89 all use '< 3.0' for angle tolerance comparisons: 'abs(rot[0] - 54.7) < 3.0' and 'abs(rot[2] - 45.0) < 3.0' and 'abs(z_mod - angle) < 3.0'. No tolerance of 2.0 is used in the verifier code.

Standard Blender default floor/ground plane name. export_result.sh line 100 checks for objects with 'plane' in name.lower(). Task description mentions 'Remove or hide the floor/background plane'. 'Plane' is the typical default name in Blender scenes.
setup_task.sh line 23 downloads from this URL. WebFetch confirmed file exists at this URL (3,009,385 bytes, dated 05-Apr-2015). Official Blender Demo Files directory listing confirmed.
Official Blender benchmark model from download.blender.org. Widely documented in Blender community. Used for rendering performance benchmarking.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Blender BMW27.blend benchmark model (3,009,385 bytes, available from https://download.blender.org/demo/test/BMW27.blend.zip). Target render resolution is 512x512 pixels with transparency enabled. Camera setup requires orthographic projection with X rotation 54.7 degrees (mathematically arctan(√2) ≈ 54.7356°) and Z rotation 45 degrees. The render is saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/iso_icon.png and blend file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/iso_setup.blend. One metadata discrepancy: claimed angle_tolerance is 2.0 degrees, but verifier.py uses 3.0 degrees. Standard Blender plane object (typically named 'Plane') serves as the background to be removed.
